form.formComment: Comes off a 35 day let-up. Most recently ran last of 7 at Antalya on March 10 over 1400m, behind Kecikhan with 59kg at $8.75. The start before that made ground from midfield; 3rd of 12 at Antalya on February 26 over 2000m, 6 len behind Lets Love carrying 60kg at $12.25. Capable of a big finish so don?t write her off.
